category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Qatar QGOSM conformity, GSO/IEC standards, and GSO energy-efficiency labelling requirements.

title.en: China-to-Qatar Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入卡塔尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入卡塔爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Qatar QGOSM conformity registration, GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 safety, GSO EMC standards, GSO energy-efficiency labelling/MEPS, R-600a refrigerant handling, and in-country importer requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与卡塔尔QGOSM合格注册、GSO/IEC 60335-2-24安全、GSO电磁兼容标准、GSO能效标识/MEPS、R-600a制冷剂处理及当地进口商要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與卡塔爾QGOSM合格註冊、GSO/IEC 60335-2-24安全、GSO電磁相容標準、GSO能效標識/MEPS、R-600a製冷劑處理及當地進口商要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Qatar QGOSM regulations, GSO standards, GSO energy-efficiency labelling thresholds, refrigerant provisions, and in-country importer requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行卡塔尔QGOSM法规、GSO标准、GSO能效标识门槛值、制冷剂条款及当地进口商要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行卡塔爾QGOSM法規、GSO標準、GSO能效標識門檻值、製冷劑條款及當地進口商要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face five major Qatar compliance gaps: (1) electrical safety conformity to GSO IEC 60335-2-24 under the QGOSM conformity regime — CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted, and units must be rated for the Qatar 240 V / 50 Hz supply; (2) GSO energy-efficiency labelling and MEPS compliance — a GSO/Qatar energy-efficiency label must be earned and affixed, distinct from China's GB 12021.2 grades; (3) EMC compliance to GSO-adopted CISPR/IEC standards — Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC test data cannot substitute without re-issuance to GSO-referenced standards; (4) appointment of a Qatar-registered in-country importer who holds the QGOSM registration and clears goods at Hamad Port; and (5) R-600a refrigerant charge documentation against GSO/IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant requirements. R-600a is well-positioned but charge and documentation must be verified to GSO requirements.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临五大卡塔尔合规差距：（1）依据QGOSM合格制度按GSO IEC 60335-2-24进行电气安全合格评定——CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被接受，且产品须按卡塔尔240 V / 50 Hz电源额定；（2）GSO能效标识及MEPS合规——须取得并加贴GSO/卡塔尔能效标签，与中国GB 12021.2等级不同；（3）依据GSO采用的CISPR/IEC标准进行EMC合规——中国GB 4343.1 CCC检测数据未按GSO引用标准重新签发不能替代；（4）委任持有QGOSM注册并在哈马德港清关的卡塔尔注册当地进口商；（5）依据GSO/IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂要求核实R-600a充注量文件。R-600a条件良好，但充注量及文件须按GSO要求核实。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨五大卡塔爾合規差距：（1）依據QGOSM合格制度按GSO IEC 60335-2-24進行電氣安全合格評定——CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被接受，且產品須按卡塔爾240 V / 50 Hz電源額定；（2）GSO能效標識及MEPS合規——須取得並加貼GSO/卡塔爾能效標籤，與中國GB 12021.2等級不同；（3）依據GSO採用的CISPR/IEC標準進行EMC合規——中國GB 4343.1 CCC檢測數據未按GSO引用標準重新簽發不能替代；（4）委任持有QGOSM註冊並在哈馬德港清關的卡塔爾註冊當地進口商；（5）依據GSO/IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑要求核實R-600a充注量文件。R-600a條件良好，但充注量及文件須按GSO要求核實。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true. Official QGOSM, GSO, or primary legal sources are preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
